name: Pre-existing back condition worsened at work in Idaho, what proof?
description: Medical proof of aggravation; compare records.

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back condition worsened at work in Idaho, what proof?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical proof of aggravation; compare records.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Doctor opinion showing work incident aggravated it.**

Idaho covers if job contributed; prior doesn't bar.[5]

- Pre/post MRI comparisons.
- Functional capacity eval.
- No prior disability proof.

Attorney uses experts for ISIF or denials.[5] Key for multiples.
